name: Raiding Party
timing: Play during the Activation Step, before or after any action.
description: For the remainder of the game, the first Melee Attack action made by a character you control each turn deals +2 Dmg.
extraDescription: This Dmg bonus only applies when you are the active player making a Melee Attack action and not when the defender during a round of melee. It also only applies to the first Melee Attack action taken by a friendly character in a turn. Subsequent Melee Attacks from other friendly characters do not benefit from the bonus.
